problem: Why do perovskite solar cells degrade — what material instability causes it?
hypothesis: Combining Bacteriophage surface display for targeting with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Prototype device testing with 18 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
